channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: « Les joueurs ont tout faux » : le patron de Nvidia défend la technologie DLSS 5
item.description: Les joueurs qui n'aiment pas DLSS 5 ont « tout faux », a asséné Jensen Huang, le patron de Nvidia. Le dirigeant a tenté d'éteindre l'incendie qui a enflammé les communautés de joueurs après la présentation de sa future technologie d'upscaling. I faut dire qu'elle ressemble à un « filtre beauté » généré par IA imposant une esthétique similaire dans tous les jeux....

item.title: Philips new audio gear brings back the bright bold colors of the ‘80s
item.description: Not even electronics were able to escape the dominant '80s aesthetic of garishly bright colors. Both Sony and Philips offered devices wrapped in yellow plastic during that era, but Philips has decided to bring its hardware back as part of a new Moving Sound collection celebrating 100 years of the company making audio gear, as […]

item.title: L’iPhone 17 Pro Max baisse enfin de prix : 180 € de moins grâce à cette offre Amazon, mais il va falloir être patient
item.description: L'iPhone 17 Pro Max est enfin en promotion : Amazon le propose à 1 299 euros dans sa version 256 Go, au lieu de 1 479 euros à sa sortie. Même s'il est temporairement en rupture de stock et sera expédié prochainement, c'est une économie de 180 euros qui ne se refuse pas.

item.title: Sony Wants to Defeat Ghibli AI Slop… By Feeding Ghibli Movies Into Its Own Slop Machine
item.description: Sony hopes its new technology, Protective AI, will protect creators and rights holders from copyright infringement by making their own in-house AI slop machine that does the same thing.

item.title: Confessions of the ICE Agent Whisperer
item.description: Federal immigration enforcement agents usually won't talk to the media—but they will talk to independent journalist Karl Loftus.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Thursday, March 19 (game #1515)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Thursday, March 19 (game #1012)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Thursday, March 19 (game #746)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: A DJI Pocket 4 might be on its way, but right now the 'class-leading' Pocket 3 is at a new lowest-ever price
item.description: A portrait recording option has made this capable cam a major hit with vloggers and content creators.

item.title: Google expands Search Live globally
item.description: After rolling out Search Live to all US Google app users last September, Google is now bringing the feature to every place where it offers its AI Mode chatbot. Search Live, if you need a reminder, allows you to point your phone's camera at an object or scene and ask questions about what you see in front of you. Google debuted the tool at I/O 2025 before it began rolling it out to users. With today's expansion, Search Live is available in more than 200 countries and territories. What's more, Google has updated the feature to run off its Gemini 3.1 Flash model, an upgrade the company says should...

item.title: Quelles sont les meilleures batteries externes (power bank) en 2026 ?
item.description: À la recherche d'une nouvelle batterie de voyage pour les vacances ou tout simplement pour dépanner au quotidien ? Voici notre comparatif des meilleures batteries externes, classiques ou bien MagSafe, pour recharger votre smartphone ou encore vos écouteurs sans fil.

item.title: Marquis says over 672,000 people had personal and financial data stolen in ransomware attack
item.description: Fintech company Marquis is notifying hundreds of thousands of people that hackers stole their personal and financial information, including their Social Security numbers.

item.title: Satellite Images Reveal Mega-Leaks of Potent Greenhouse Gas
item.description: UCLA's Stop Methane Project ranked the 25 oil and gas sites with the largest methane emissions rates worldwide.

item.title: Les Pixel 10 vont travailler à la place des utilisateurs, mais pas pour tout le monde
item.description: Après avoir fait ses débuts sur les Galaxy S26 de Samsung, la fonction d'automatisation de Gemini débarque sur la gamme Pixel 10.

item.title: Avec son Smart Bench, Decathlon lance un banc de musculation tout équipé, design et compatible Freeletics
item.description: Decathlon a dévoilé ce mardi une partie de ses nouveautés dans le domaine du sport. Parmi les produits présentés, le nouveau Smart Bench se veut un banc de musculation design et doté de fonctionnalités connectées.

item.title: Leak Claims Next reMarkable Tablet Will Be ‘Mass-Market Focused’
item.description: Say hello to the "reMarkable Paper Pure" tablet?

item.title: Oh, you think the government will regulate Kalshi and Polymarket? Wanna bet?
item.description: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission has a problem: It's not very good at policing insider trading. And insider trading has become a pressing concern for prediction markets. Even Kalshi's recently publicized fines for insider trading - levied against a politician and an employee of YouTube influencer MrBeast - were effectively self-policing. The exchange says it's […]...

item.title: ‘Being gay feels like a liability again’: More LGBTQ+ workers are staying in the closet
item.description: More LGBTQ+ employees are shielding themselves from scrutiny by becoming less open at work. But that self-protection can also keep existing power structures intact. For much of the last decade, corporate America told a tidy story about progress: Pride logos, employee resource groups, executives marching in parades. The implication was that the workplace closet—the quiet calculation LGBTQ+ employees make about how much of themselves to reveal at work—was slowly disappearing....

item.title: Best Buy is practically giving away Samsung's art-inspired Frame TV — on sale for a ridiculously low price of just $699.99
item.description: If you've ever wanted to purchase Samsung's art-inspired QLED TV, Best Buy has the 55-inch model on sale for a new record-low price of just $699.99.

item.title: People in romantic relationships with AI want more than just ‘smut’ from ChatGPT
item.description: As OpenAI delays the chatbot’s ‘adult mode,’ some users who profess to be involved with AI partners say they just want to have grownup conversations. For most, ChatGPT is nothing more than a tool to write emails or ask silly questions. But for some, their chat is their partner, and they want more.

item.title: AirPods Max 2 vs AirPods Max : ce qui change vraiment (et ce qui ne change pas)
item.description: Apple a récemment pris le marché par surprise en lançant l'AirPods Max 2, cinq ans après la première génération. Si l'apparence extérieure reste scrupuleusement identique, des changements notables sont visibles sous le capot grâce à l'intégration de la puce H2. Voici les différences notables à connaître.

item.title: BMW’s New i3 Sedan Targets Tesla Model 3 in a World of Electric SUVs
item.description: While its rivals keep rethinking their EV strategies, BMW has persisted.

item.title: Free revient avec le même forfait à moins de 10 euros, mais avec 40 Go de 5G en plus
item.description: Free Mobile met en avant sa Série Free à 9,99 euros par mois pendant un an depuis quelques semaines. Si l'offre proposait 110 Go la semaine dernière, c'est aujourd'hui 150 Go de 5G pour le même prix, et toujours avec 30 Go depuis l’Europe et les DOM, les appels, SMS et MMS illimités, ainsi que quelques services qui ne sont pas si fréquents à ce prix. ...

item.title: Forget the new MacBook Air — the MacBook Pro M5 is down to a record-low price at Amazon right now
item.description: The MacBook Pro (M5, 2025) is one of the best laptops around right now. It's enjoying its lowest ever price at Amazon today. Here's why you need it.

item.title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day trailer: Tom Holland yearns for Zendaya in action-packed first look
item.description: "Spider-Man: Brand New Day" picks up four years after "Spider-Man: No Way Home." It hits theaters July 31.

item.title: ‘1000 Women in Horror’ Explores Blood, Guts, and Long-Overdue Equality
item.description: A new Shudder documentary gazes at horror history through a feminist lens, featuring interviews with Akela Cooper, Mary Harron, Kate Siegel, and more.

item.title: Hundreds of Millions of iPhones Can Be Hacked With a New Tool Found in the Wild
item.description: A powerful iPhone-hacking technique known as DarkSword has been discovered in use by Russian hackers. It can take over devices running iOS 18 that simply visit infected websites.

item.title: Russians caught stealing personal data from Ukrainians with new advanced iPhone hacking tools
item.description: A suspected group of Russian government hackers was caught targeting Ukrainians with new iPhone hacking tools designed for espionage and potentially to steal crypto.

item.title: Infostealers are being disguised as Claude Code, OpenClaw and other AI developer tools
item.description: Be careful with search engine results, crooks are smuggling infostealers again.

item.title: 'The current shortage could continue until 2030, so we expect more than a 20% shortage of the wafers': SK Group chairman issues bleak warning on RAM crisis
item.description: We've had previous forecasts that the RAM crisis will continue through to 2028 — but 2030 is upping the ante worryingly here.

item.title: My March Madness might be cured by the new trackable bracket in Apple Sports — but it's missing one thing
item.description: Apple Sports App fans just got a long-awaited March Madness update — brackets — and now they can track the tournament in visual style.

item.title: Space-1 Vera Rubin : pourquoi Nvidia déploie ses GPU dans l’espace (et comment ils y survivent)
item.description: Pourquoi envoyer des puces à 50 pétaflops en orbite ? C'est la question posée par le projet Space-1. Nvidia a conçu un GPU endurci, capable de fonctionner sans air, pour transformer nos satellites en véritables centres de données dopés à l'intelligence artificielle.

item.title: Moins de paperasse pour rivaliser avec les US et la Chine : Bruxelles lance EU Inc
item.description: Créer une entreprise en 48 heures pouvant opérer dans les 27 pays de l'Union européenne, c'est l'objectif de la dernière initiative EU Inc de la Commission européenne. Un sacré Meccano institutionnel et administratif en perspective, mais qui devrait améliorer l'attractivité du vieux continent — et mieux rivaliser avec les États-Unis et la Chine. Sacré programme....

item.title: I tested the new ChatGPT-5.4 mini and nano models — and I didn’t expect them to be this powerful
item.description: OpenAI’s new GPT-5.4 mini and nano models bring a faster, more thoughtful ChatGPT experience to free users than I expected.

item.title: Jeff Bezos Wants to Save Earth With This Freaky-Looking Probe
item.description: Blue Origin unveiled a planetary defense concept to protect Earth from incoming asteroids.

item.title: How the Fed is expected to maneuver interest rates in the wake of the war in Iran
item.description: The expectation is that the key rate will remain unchanged at about 3.6%. A key question hangs over the Federal Reserve’s two-day meeting that ends Wednesday: Will central bank policymakers still reduce short-term interest rates this year, now that the Iran war has sent oil prices higher and gas prices spiking? Or will they have to stand pat for months to see how the conflict plays out?Fed Chair Jerome Powell is almost certain to announce Wednesday that the central bank has kept its key rate unchanged for the second straight meeting at about 3.6%. But the Fed will also release a set of quarter...

item.title: A new Stuff Your Kindle Day is live for lovers of romance — score free romance books right now
item.description: The latest Stuff Your Kindle Day is live until March 21. This Romance Book Blast is offering romance books for free.

item.title: Panne Free : les Freebox bloquées en étape 6 dans la région de Nantes
item.description: Si votre Freebox affiche désespérément "Étape 6" depuis 10h ce matin, vous n'êtes pas seul. Une panne frappe actuellement le réseau de Free.

item.title: Save a massive $1125 on the 4TB WD Black SN850X internal SSD with 7300MB/s speeds — now under $600 in Best Buy's tech sale
item.description: WD’s 4TB internal SSD is now available at a huge 65% discount, offering extremely fast speeds, high-capacity storage, and reliable performance.

item.title: Quels sont les meilleurs smartphones à moins de 500 euros en 2026 ? La sélection
item.description: Vous êtes à la recherche d'un téléphone à l'excellent rapport qualité/prix ? Pour bénéficier de solides prestations sans y mettre un mois de salaire, une limite de budget doit être fixée. Voici notre sélection des meilleurs smartphones à moins de 500 euros.

item.title: DOD says Anthropic’s ‘red lines’ make it an ‘unacceptable risk to national security’
item.description: The Defense Department said concerns that Anthropic might "attempt to disable its technology" during "warfighting operations" validate its decision to label the AI firm a supply chain risk.

item.title: Tech companies are teaming up to combat scammers
item.description: A coalition of Big Tech companies is working on a more comprehensive solution to combat online scams. As first reported by Axios, Google, Microsoft, LinkedIn, Meta, Amazon, OpenAI, Adobe, Levi Strauss & Co, Target, Pinterest and Match Group announced the signing of the Industry Accord Against Online Scams and Fraud. The new agreement is meant to put up a united industry-wide front against online fraud and scams, particularly those from sophisticated criminal networks that use multiple platforms. According to the Axios report, the measures will include adding fraud detection tools, introducing ...

item.title: The hits keep coming in Spider-Man: Brand New Day’s first trailer
item.description: The first trailer for Spider-Man: Brand New Day is finally here, and it looks like Marvel and Sony are about to put Peter Parker through a different kind of existential crisis. Though nobody in Brand New Day's trailer knows who Peter (Tom Holland) is or that he's the one saving people as Spider-Man, he still […]

item.title: Pas d’écran Samsung sur les prochains smartphones Galaxy ? La marque changerait de fournisseur
item.description: Au lieu d'équiper ses smartphones d'écrans fabriqués en interne, Samsung ferait appel à un prestataire extérieur pour de futurs modèles.

item.title: Lenovo teste une batterie haute densité pour PC portables
item.description: Le silicium arrive enfin dans nos PC. Lenovo s'attaque au mur de l'autonomie avec un prototype de batterie affichant 1 000 Wh/l de densité énergétique.
